metadata.description: Optional. VM/Arc machine resourceId to associate the DCR. Leave empty to skip association.

dataFlows.transformKql:
source
| where RawData matches regex @"^\d{1,2}/\d{1,2}/\d{4}\s"
| extend LogTime = todatetime(extract(@"^(\d{1,2}/\d{1,2}/\d{4}\s+\d{1,2}:\d{2}:\d{2}\s+[AP]M)", 1, RawData))
| extend ThreadId = extract(@"^\S+\s+\S+\s+([0-9A-Fa-f]{4})\s", 1, RawData)
| extend Context = extract(@"^\S+\s+\S+\s+[0-9A-Fa-f]{4}\s+(\S+)\s", 1, RawData)
| extend PacketId = extract(@"\bPACKET\s+([0-9A-Fa-f]+)\b", 1, RawData)
| extend Protocol = toupper(extract(@"\b(UDP|TCP)\b", 1, RawData))
| extend Direction = extract(@"\b(Rcv|Snd)\b", 1, RawData)
| extend RemoteIP = extract(@"\b(?:Rcv|Snd)\s+([0-9\.]+)\b", 1, RawData)
| extend XID = extract(@"\b(?:Rcv|Snd)\s+[0-9\.]+\s+([0-9A-Fa-f]{4})\b", 1, RawData)
| extend QueryResponse = iif(RawData matches regex @"\b[0-9A-Fa-f]{4}\s+R\s+[QNU\?]\s+\[", "R", "Q")
| extend Opcode = extract(@"\b[0-9A-Fa-f]{4}\s+(?:R\s+)?([QNU\?])\s+\[", 1, RawData)
| extend FlagsHex = extract(@"\[\s*([0-9A-Fa-f]{4})", 1, RawData)
| extend Flags = extract(@"\[\s*[0-9A-Fa-f]{4}\s+([A-Z]+)", 1, RawData)
| extend RCode = extract(@"\b(NOERROR|NXDOMAIN|SERVFAIL|REFUSED|FORMERR|NOTIMP)\b", 1, RawData)
| extend QueryType = toupper(extract(@"\]\s+([A-Za-z0-9]+)\s+\(", 1, RawData))
| extend Labels = extract_all(@"\(\d+\)([^()]+)", RawData)
| extend QueryName = iif(array_length(Labels) > 0, strcat_array(Labels, "."), "")
| where isempty(QueryType) or QueryType !in ("A", "AAAA")
| project TimeGenerated, FilePath, Computer,
          LogTime, ThreadId, Context, PacketId, Protocol, Direction, RemoteIP, XID,
          QueryResponse, Opcode, FlagsHex, Flags, RCode, QueryType, QueryName

source
| where RawData matches regex @"^\d{1,2}/\d{1,2}/\d{4}\s"
| extend LogTime = todatetime(extract(@"^(\d{1,2}/\d{1,2}/\d{4}\s+\d{1,2}:\d{2}:\d{2}\s+[AP]M)", 1, RawData))
| extend PacketId = extract(@"\bPACKET\s+([0-9A-Fa-f]+)\b", 1, RawData)
| extend Protocol = toupper(extract(@"\b(UDP|TCP)\b", 1, RawData))
| extend Direction = extract(@"\b(Rcv|Snd)\b", 1, RawData)
| extend RemoteIP = extract(@"\b(?:Rcv|Snd)\s+([0-9\.]+)\b", 1, RawData)
| extend XID = extract(@"\b(?:Rcv|Snd)\s+[0-9\.]+\s+([0-9A-Fa-f]{4})\b", 1, RawData)
| extend QueryResponse = iif(RawData matches regex @"\b[0-9A-Fa-f]{4}\s+R\s+[QNU\?]\s+\[", "R", "Q")
| extend Opcode = extract(@"\b[0-9A-Fa-f]{4}\s+(?:R\s+)?([QNU\?])\s+\[", 1, RawData)
| extend FlagsHex = extract(@"\[\s*([0-9A-Fa-f]{4})", 1, RawData)
| extend Flags = extract(@"\[\s*[0-9A-Fa-f]{4}\s+([A-Z]+)", 1, RawData)
| extend RCode = extract(@"\b(NOERROR|NXDOMAIN|SERVFAIL|REFUSED|FORMERR|NOTIMP)\b", 1, RawData)
| extend QueryType = toupper(extract(@"\]\s+([A-Za-z0-9]+)\s+\(", 1, RawData))
| extend Labels = extract_all(@"\(\d+\)([^()]+)", RawData)
| extend QueryName = iif(array_length(Labels) > 0, strcat_array(Labels, "."), "")
| where QueryType in ("A", "AAAA")
| project TimeGenerated, FilePath, Computer,
          LogTime, PacketId, Protocol, Direction, RemoteIP, XID,
          QueryResponse, Opcode, FlagsHex, Flags, RCode, QueryType, QueryName

properties.description: Association for DNS debug file DCR
